image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about cohort studies than social media does.
Context visual: Cohort studies track groups over time, observing how different factors affect health outcomes.
Escalation visual: Imagine following thousands of people to see how lifestyle choices impact disease risk.
Evidence visual: Studies show that smokers have a higher risk of lung cancer, but not everyone who smokes gets it.
Payoff visual: This uncertainty highlights that while trends exist, individual outcomes vary.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into health science? Like and follow for more insights!
